creator: grembo@FreeBSD.org
text:
For me, I can only reproduce it using an older build of the package:

pftop:
build_timestamp: 2024-07-07T08:30:44+0000
ports_top_git_hash: 854c13714

libpfctl: 
build_timestamp: 2024-10-08T01:04:49+0000
ports_top_git_hash: 19fbadfb9

With current builds (like the ones you documented or also building locally) I cannot reproduce.
